title: Open Guideline Assessment Project
author: Boesen, Kim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the protocol to the  Open Guideline Assessment Project , in which we will systematially search for studies that have assessed the scientific evidence in clinical guidelines across medical specialties. The protocol includes Table 1 with, as of May 2024, all 32 studies that we have knowledge of prior to our systematic search.
steps_raw: This is the protocol to the  Open Guideline Assessment Project , in which we will systematially search for studies that have assessed the scientific evidence in clinical guidelines across medical specialties. The protocol includes Table 1 with, as of May 2024, all 32 studies that we have knowledge of prior to our systematic search.
